name: Bubble Battle Blast 3D
short_description: Bubble Battle Blast 3D is a retro arcade third-person shooter in which a spaceship battles its way through 8 arenas in which a guard drone protects bubbles. Earn ship-enhancing items and temporary power-ups by blasting bubbles with lasers, Earn bonus points after each arena to upgrade faster.
detailed_description:
Bubble Battle Blast 3D is a retro arcade third-person shooter where you control a spaceship, battling your way through 8 arenas in which a guard drone protects bubbles. You will earn ship-enhancing items and temporary power-ups by blasting bubbles with lasers, and earn bonus points after each arena to upgrade faster.

Features

  • 8 different arena levels to battle

  • A bonus level after each arena

  • 16 different power-ups or ship upgrades

  • Original soundtrack by Sway Casey

  • A final boss battle
